@graph.description:
We want to recreate the multi-omic inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) gut microbiome analysis from Lloyd-Price et al. 2019 Nature (the IBDMDB / HMP2 study), SRA BioProject PRJNA398089. The study longitudinally profiled the gut microbiome and host transcriptome in 132 subjects (CD, UC, and healthy controls) over ~1 year, with stool samples collected every two weeks and colon biopsies at colonoscopy. We focus on the shotgun metagenomics + metatranscriptomics arms.

The metagenomics pipeline follows the HMP2 protocol. Process raw paired-end Illumina reads with KneadData v0.7+ for host (hg38) read removal and quality trimming. Run MetaPhlAn4 for taxonomic profiling (species-level relative abundances). Run HUMAnN3 for functional profiling (UniRef90 gene family abundances and MetaCyc pathway coverage). Normalize functional profiles by total sum scaling (TSS) for relative abundance and by reads-per-kilobase (RPK) for gene family counts.

For taxonomic analysis, reproduce the dysbiosis index: compute per-sample Bray-Curtis dissimilarity from MetaPhlAn species profiles. Active IBD flare samples (fecal calprotectin > 200 ug/g) should show higher Bray-Curtis distance from the healthy-cohort centroid than remission samples (p < 0.01 by Wilcoxon). Key dysbiosis species: Bacteroides fragilis, Ruminococcus gnavus enriched in IBD vs healthy; Roseburia intestinalis, Akkermansia muciniphila depleted. At least 4 of these 4 expected species must show the correct direction of effect at FDR < 0.1.

For longitudinal stability analysis, compute intra-individual vs inter-individual Bray-Curtis distances. Intra-individual should be lower than inter-individual for healthy subjects (p < 0.001). Model dysbiosis episodes using a hidden Markov model with 2 states (stable/dysbiotic) per subject time series; CD and UC subjects should show more state transitions per year than healthy (p < 0.05).

Run ANCOM-BC2 for differential abundance testing between disease groups at the species level. Run Maaslin2 for multivariable association of species abundance with antibiotic exposure, host genetics (IBD risk alleles from the metadata), and inflammation markers.

Acceptance: MetaPhlAn4 profiling of at least 800/1,595 stool samples; dysbiosis species directional effects reproduced for 4/4 listed species at FDR < 0.1; intra-individual stability lower than inter-individual in healthy cohort (p < 0.001).
@graph.name:
computational biology — Shotgun metagenomics or 16S amplicon taxonomic profiling. Standard
pipeline: raw QC, trim, classify reads against a reference database
(Kraken2 / MetaPhlAn / QIIME2-DADA2), then alpha + beta diversity
with group-comparison statistics. Mirrors today's
`config/stage-taxonomies/metagenomics.yaml`.

Agent Instructions
Workflow Context
Discovery and scoring policies
Execution provenance log
Homo sapiens
Discover method for taxonomic_classification (options: kraken2, metaphlan, qiime2_dada2, qiime2_deblur, bracken, centrifuge). Surface set_intake_method.
Discover method for sequence_trimming (options: trimmomatic, cutadapt, fastp, trim_galore). Surface set_intake_method.

Acquire raw experimental data from public repositories (SRA, GEO, ArrayExpress,
ENA, PRIDE, ClinVar, gnomAD, GTEx) or SME-supplied paths. Emits a cohort manifest,
per-accession provenance summary, and an index pointing at the materialized
artifacts. Downstream atoms consume the manifest, not the raw bytes directly.

Validate outputs of: Acquire raw experimental data from public repositories (SRA, GEO, ArrayExpress,
ENA, PRIDE, ClinVar, gnomAD, GTEx) or SME-supplied paths. Emits a cohort manifest,
per-accession provenance summary, and an index pointing at the materialized
artifacts. Downstream atoms consume the manifest, not the raw bytes directly.

Run sequencing QC (FastQC, MultiQC) on raw FASTQ inputs. Emits a per-sample metric
table and aggregated report; downstream `sequence_trimming` reads the trim-needed
flag.

Validate outputs of: Run sequencing QC (FastQC, MultiQC) on raw FASTQ inputs. Emits a per-sample metric
table and aggregated report; downstream `sequence_trimming` reads the trim-needed
flag.

Trim adapters and low-quality bases from raw reads. Conditional in legacy
taxonomies on `raw_qc.result.needs_trimming`; the atom always runs and emits
trimmed FASTQ regardless of whether it altered the inputs (idempotent on
already-clean data).

Validate outputs of: Trim adapters and low-quality bases from raw reads. Conditional in legacy
taxonomies on `raw_qc.result.needs_trimming`; the atom always runs and emits
trimmed FASTQ regardless of whether it altered the inputs (idempotent on
already-clean data).

Assign taxonomic identities to metagenomic reads or contigs. Kraken2 /
MetaPhlAn / QIIME2 (DADA2 / Deblur) / Bracken selected at runtime by
modality (shotgun vs amplicon).

Validate outputs of: Assign taxonomic identities to metagenomic reads or contigs. Kraken2 /
MetaPhlAn / QIIME2 (DADA2 / Deblur) / Bracken selected at runtime by
modality (shotgun vs amplicon).

Compute alpha (Shannon / Simpson / Chao1 / Faith PD) and beta (Bray-Curtis /
weighted-UniFrac / Jaccard) diversity from a taxonomic profile, plus
ordination (PCoA / NMDS) and group-comparison statistics (PERMANOVA /
ANOSIM). swfc namespace per EDAM audit — operation:2238 (statistical
calculation) is over-broad.

Validate outputs of: Compute alpha (Shannon / Simpson / Chao1 / Faith PD) and beta (Bray-Curtis /
weighted-UniFrac / Jaccard) diversity from a taxonomic profile, plus
ordination (PCoA / NMDS) and group-comparison statistics (PERMANOVA /
ANOSIM). swfc namespace per EDAM audit — operation:2238 (statistical
calculation) is over-broad.

Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

Validate outputs of: Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

Validate outputs of: Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.
